title: Preemption
doc_html:
§1749.22. Preemption

            Except as provided in this Part, no parish, municipal, local, or state governing authority may enact any ordinance or promulgate any rules or regulations which are in conflict with the provisions of this Part.

            Acts 1988, No. 923, §1; Acts 2019, No. 344, §1.
doc_text:
§1749.22.  Preemption
Except as provided in this Part, no parish, municipal, local, or state governing
authority may enact any ordinance or promulgate any rules or regulations which are in
conflict with the provisions of this Part.
Acts 1988, No. 923, §1; Acts 2019, No. 344, §1.
